title: Business Analyst (Digital Operations)
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking a skilled and analytical Business Analyst to play a critical role in our digital transformation journey with regional responsibilities. As a key member of the digital operations team, you will be responsible for analyzing current business processes, identifying opportunities for digital transformation, and working closely with stakeholders to implement innovative solutions that optimize operational efficiency and enhance customer experience.

Key Responsibilities:

- Requirements Gathering: Work with stakeholders across various departments across the region to gather and document detailed business requirements for digital transformation initiatives.

- Process Analysis: Analyze existing operational processes to identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and areas for improvement through digitalization.

- Solution Design and Implementation: Collaborate with IT and operations teams to design and implement digital solutions that address business and operation’s needs, leveraging technologies such as automation, AI, and data analytics.

- Data Analysis: Utilize data to provide insights on operational performance, identify trends, and recommend data-driven improvements to support digital transformation.

- Stakeholder Communication: Serve as a liaison between business units, IT, Operations, and external vendors, ensuring clear communication and alignment throughout the transformation process.

- Change Management: Support the adoption of new digital tools and processes by helping to develop training materials and conducting workshops for end-users.

- Testing & Validation: Coordinate and participate in user acceptance testing (UAT) to ensure that digital solutions meet business and operation’s requirements and are ready for deployment.

- Continuous Improvement: Monitor the effectiveness of implemented digital solutions and propose enhancements to drive ongoing operational efficiency.

Qualifications:

- 5+ years of experience as a Business Analyst, with a focus on operations or digital transformation.

- Strong understanding of business process analysis and improvement methodologies.

- Experience with digital tools and technologies, such as automation platforms and data analytics.

- Proficiency in data analysis and visualization tools (e.g., Excel, Power BI).

- Excellent problem-solving skills with a detail-oriented approach to identifying and addressing business and operation’s needs.

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams across the region.

- Experience with project management methodologies and tools (e.g., SDLC, Agile, Scrum).
- Experience in the Financial/ Banking sector is a big plus

postedCompany.description:
The longest-established Singapore bank, we’ve been helping people and businesses get what they want from life since 1932. How? By taking the time to truly understand their needs. And it starts with looking after our people. With a motivated, purpose-driven culture. Looking after your well-being. Providing continuous holistic growth. 


Today, we are on a journey of transformation. Pioneering banking solutions with a future-ready mindset. Unleashing the creativity and ambition of our people though the largest-of-its-kind open-learning program. Harnessing the power of seamless data and technology to create first-to-market products and services. Partnering with sustainability innovators. Financing green technologies. Working in close-knit collaborative teams. Where you feel included and in complete control of your career growth. Now and into the future. 


We are recognised as one of the World's Top 50 Safest Banks by Global Finance. And the best-managed bank in Singapore and Asia Pacific by The Asian Banker. From this foundation of financial strength and robust technology, we serve 3.5 million people across Asia. Our footprint covers over 1,000 branches throughout Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, China, Hong Kong and Macao.  


Now it's time to launch your career at the forefront of banking. Whether you want to innovate needs-based financial services. Find the best version of yourself in a friendly, supportive team. Build lasting value in your community. Help people grow their assets, business, and investments. Take your learning as far as you can. Or simply enjoy a vibrant, future-ready career, your Opportunity Starts Here.
postedCompany.name: OVERSEA-CHINESE BANKING CORPORATION LIMITED
